text:
is a song It was taken from the game arrangement album Lilia~from Ys~ (KICA-132). It is sung by Kotono Mitsuishi, who voices Misato Katsuragi. by Kotono Mitsuishi. It was published on the album Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone Original Soundtrack. https://vgmdb.net/album/22384 

It was originally recorded for the 1992 arrangement album Lilia~from Ys~ dedicated to the Ys video game series. https://vgmdb.net/album/4584

Aoi yami ga anata wotorimaku

Hitomi wo toji te mimi wo suma seba

Haruka kanata ni kokoro wo toba shite
Itsumosobaniirukara

Nami ga sawagu tabini yuuki wo tamesu kedo
Shinji tara nanimo kowakunai

Aoi yami ga anata wo sasou

Even if I connect the pieces of my tears
I can't see tomorrow
I will keep praying for your safety
On such a stormy night

Anxiety grows even in the shape of clouds
If you believe, you can go anywhere

Blue darkness surrounds you
I feel like I'm about to be torn apart by the intensity
The hot wind shakes love
Our bond will become a legend

If you close your eyes and listen carefully
I can see you
Fly your heart far away
Because you're always by my side

Every time the waves make noise, I test my courage
If you believe, you won't be afraid of anything

Blue darkness invites you
While shaking my sorrow
Dreaming of the distant future in my chest
Our oath will become a legend

Blue darkness surrounds you
I feel like I'm about to be torn apart by the intensity
The hot wind shakes love

涙のかけら つないでみても
明日は見えないから
あなたの無事を 祈りつづけるわ
こんな嵐の夜は

雲の形にさえ 不安はつのるけど
信じたら どこまでも行ける

蒼い闇が あなたをとりまく
激しさにちぎれそうなくらい
熱い風が 愛を揺らすほどに
二人の絆は伝説になるわ

瞳を閉じて 耳を澄ませば
あなたが見えてくるわ
はるか彼方に 心を飛ばして
いつもそばにいるから

波が騒ぐたびに 勇気を試すけど
信じたら 何もこわくない

蒼い闇が あなたを誘う
悲しみを 振りかざしながら
遠い未来 この胸に夢見て
二人の誓いは伝説になるわ
